content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.x_automation.social_manager
FILE: cosmos/integration/x_automation/social_manager.py (234 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGER
Continuous social posting with Grok image generation for memes.
Runs as background task integrated with main server.

CLASSES:
- ImageGeneratorWrapper: Wrapper for the unified image generator
  Methods: async def generate_image(self, prompt: str) -> Optional[bytes]
  Methods: async def generate_meme(self) -> tuple
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> dict
- SocialMediaManager: Unified social media manager for X and Moltbook
  Methods: def reset_daily_count(self)
  Methods: def get_random_content(self) -> tuple
  Methods: async def post_to_x(self, text: str, image_bytes: Optional[bytes]=None) -> bool
  Methods: async def post_to_moltbook(self, text: str, image_bytes: Optional[bytes]=None) -> bool
  Methods: async def post_cycle(self, force_meme: bool=False)
  Methods: async def run_forever(self)
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> Dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def load_env()
- def get_social_manager() -> SocialMediaManager
- async def start_social_manager()
